alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FACreateHorizon1 bit null

alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FACreateHorizon2 bit null

alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FACreateHorizon3 bit null

alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FAUpdateTerminHorizon1 bit null

alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FAUpdateTerminHorizon2 bit null

alter table __CTS_AccessProfile
add FAUpdateTerminHorizon3 bit null
